response:
*KEEP THE AREA CLEAN*  
BRUSH GENTLY AND THOROUGHLY TWICE A DAY  
RINSE WITH WATER AFTER EVERY MEAL  
*FLOSS CAREFULLY*  
FLOSS AROUND THE AFFECTED TOOTH  
REMOVE FOOD PARTICLES GENTLY  
*AVOID CERTAIN FOODS*  
STAY AWAY FROM HARD, STICKY, OR CHERRY FOODS  
AVOID EXTREME HOT OR COLD ITEMS  
*USE TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS*  
TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS ARE AVAILABLE AT PHARMACIES  
USE THEM AS INSTRUCTIONS SUGGEST  
*MONITOR FOR CHANGES*  
KEEP AN EYE ON THE TOOTH FOR ANY SIGNS OF INFECTION  
*SEE DENTAL CARE IMMEDIATELY*  
DENTAL CARE IS CRUCIAL TO PREVENT SEVERE PROBLEMS
